---
applyTo: ["**/data/**", "**/finance/**", "**/analytics/**", "**/models/**", "**/*.ipynb"]
description: "Data, analytics, finance, markets, and macro rules."
---

# Data Finance Rules

- Do not invent data, formulas, or financial assumptions.
- State units, currency, time period, source, and missing-data behavior.
- Separate observed data, computed metrics, and interpretation.
- Prefer official or primary sources for market, macro, regulatory, and
  financial facts.
- Exclude future projections unless explicitly requested.
- Validate calculations with small representative cases.
